rows.decision_rationale: esterase (estA) is provisionally assigned to ser_his_acid_hydrolase: retrieval score 0.6855 clears the 0.4115 floor and the review context reports not_required cofactor evidence.
mechanism_text_snippets: A nucleophilic residue attacks at the substrate carbonyl, forming a tetrahedral intermediate (the anionic transition state being stabilised by an oxyanion hole). This collapses to give an acyl-enzyme intermediate, which is hydrolysed to yield the free residue and substrate.
